author: nottherealtar
install_msg: `/compliment` for yourself, `/compliment @user` to aim praise. Aliases: beanpraise, praiseroulette.
name: complimentroulette
description: Hybrid /compliment with a large pool of oddly specific praise; optional target member. No persistence.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any data or metadata about users.
